scenarios.title: Basic Route Small Talk
scenarios.description: Prove the deterministic BASIC path and basic-turn trace events.
messages: Hello there. Give me a brief explanation of what this assistant can help with.

scenarios.title: General Agent Grounded RAG
scenarios.description: Force AGENT and show general-agent delegation to the KB-backed RAG tool.

messages.content: Using the indexed knowledge base, explain what changed around tool-calling reliability in the release notes and why those changes matter to production operations. Include citations.

fallback_prompts: Use rag_agent_tool on the indexed knowledge base and explain what changed around tool-calling reliability in the release notes. Return a grounded answer with citations.
Use the KB-backed RAG workflow only. Summarize the release-note changes around tool-calling reliability and include a citations section.

scenarios.title: Direct Grounded RAG
scenarios.description: Show the direct grounded-document path that starts in rag_worker without going through the general tool layer.
messages: Using the indexed knowledge base, explain what changed around tool-calling reliability in the release notes and why those changes matter to production operations. Include citations.
fallback_prompts: Use the direct grounded-document workflow only. Explain what changed around tool-calling reliability in the release notes and include citations.
Start in the grounded RAG specialist. Summarize the release-note changes around tool-calling reliability with a citations section.

scenarios.title: Data Analyst CSV Review
scenarios.description: Route into data_analyst, inspect uploaded CSVs, and execute code in the sandbox.
messages: Analyze the uploaded CSV spreadsheets with Python and pandas. Join them on region, calculate the reserve target gap for each region, and identify the top three highest-risk regions with a concise table and summary.
fallback_prompts: Analyze the uploaded CSV spreadsheet data using the data analyst workflow. Use load_dataset, inspect the columns, then execute Python code to join the files on region and rank the highest reserve gaps.
Use the data_analyst agent workflow on the uploaded CSV files. Inspect the data first, then write Python code to calculate reserve gaps and rank the top three risk regions.

scenarios.title: Coordinator Due Diligence
scenarios.description: Show coordinator planning, rag workers, finalization, and verification over a multi-document diligence task.
messages: Research across 06_master_services_agreement_v2.md, 08_data_processing_addendum_global.md, and 11_vendor_security_schedule.md. Plan the work, gather evidence, synthesize the answer, and verify it before responding with citations.
fallback_prompts: This is a multi-step research and verification task. Orchestrate it with planning, worker execution, synthesis, and verification across 06_master_services_agreement_v2.md, 08_data_processing_addendum_global.md, and 11_vendor_security_schedule.md.
Coordinate a multi-step due-diligence review: plan the work, run document workers, synthesize the findings, and verify the answer across the MSA, DPA, and vendor security schedule.

scenarios.title: Coordinator Mixed Workers
scenarios.description: Force a coordinator-led workflow that surfaces utility, rag_worker, and general workers in the same session.
messages: This is a coordinated workflow. First, calculate a 12.5% reserve from a 1900000 USD budget and list the most relevant diligence documents. Second, analyze 08_data_processing_addendum_global.md and 11_vendor_security_schedule.md for the top obligations and risks. Third, have a general-purpose worker convert those intermediate results into an executive decision memo. Plan the work, execute the specialist tasks, synthesize the result, and verify it.
fallback_prompts: Coordinate this as three explicit worker tasks: one utility task for the reserve calculation and document listing, one rag_worker task for the contract evidence, and one general worker task to draft an executive memo from the intermediate outputs. Then finalize and verify.
Use the coordinator. Create one utility task, one rag_worker task, and one general task, then synthesize and verify the final answer.

scenarios.title: Synchronous Long-Form Writing
scenarios.description: Pin the general agent and demonstrate synchronous long-form writing with a returned Markdown artifact plus manifest files in the workspace.

messages.content: Using the indexed repo documents, write a multi-section architecture briefing that explains how the live runtime routes work, how long-form writing is orchestrated, and how artifacts and traces are exposed to users. Keep it grounded in the indexed material and attach the full draft as a Markdown artifact.

fallback_prompts: Use the general agent long-form writing path only. Produce a grounded four-section architecture briefing and attach the generated Markdown draft as an artifact.
Write a grounded long-form runtime architecture briefing with metadata.long_output enabled and return the Markdown artifact.
